## Description
Describe the changes introduced by this pull request and the problem they solve.

## Related Issues
List any related issues or pull requests (e.g. Closes #123).

## Type of Change
Select the type of change that applies:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring (code cleanup, performance optimizations, no API changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
Verify that the following tasks are completed before requesting review:
- [ ] The code compiles without errors or warnings.
- [ ] Existing and new unit tests pass successfully.
- [ ] Changes align with the database migrations and schema design.
- [ ] Formatting and style guidelines have been followed.
- [ ] Documentation or README has been updated where necessary.

## Screenshots or Recordings (if applicable)
Add visual context (images, videos, or gifs) to demonstrate UI or behavior changes.
